commands.title: Open the Sovereign Variables Command Vessel

walkthroughs.title: Sovereign Variables • Skyes Over London Command Deck
walkthroughs.description: Premium offline-first environment control by Skyes Over London LC. Built for founders, operators, builders, and teams who want local authority, encrypted handoff packages, and branded spectacle without forced backend dependency.

steps.title: What Sovereign Variables is
steps.description: Built by **Skyes Over London LC**, Sovereign Variables gives you a premium operator surface for environment variables, deployment notes, and encrypted handoff packages. It is not generic extension fluff. It is a controlled offline-first vessel for serious builders.

steps.title: Why people actually need it
steps.description: Move sensitive configuration work out of messy copy-paste habits and into a branded, local-first control surface. This is for people who want speed **and** authority — without forcing a cloud dependency for the core lane.

steps.title: Launch the full command vessel
steps.description:
Open the complete Skyes Over London surface now.
